name: Fruity Yogurt Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Raspberry or red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a blender.
2. Cover and blend on high speed for about 15 seconds, or until smooth.
Frozen unsweetened loose-pack raspberries and strawberries can be substituted for the fresh raspberries and strawberries.
4 servings.
